item.title: Ciox Health breach impacts 30+ institutions: Why does healthcare continue to be targeted in 2022?
item.description: Ciox Health discloses 2021 data breach to customers six months later in a world where healthcare remains the number one target of attack. Learn why.

item.title: Reputational Cyber Risk – How to Avoid Business Loss
item.description: Managing reputational risk goes hand-in-hand with monitoring third party risk and maintaining strong cyber posture within the threat landscape.

item.title: What is Patch Management, and How Does it Impact Cyber Risk Management?
item.description: Discover how automation and continuous monitoring can revolutionize your patch management program and keep your network safe from malicious actors.

item.title: New Year’s Resolutions for 2022: Cyber Risk Learnings
item.description: Look back on cybersecurity learnings from 2021 and into the future of 2022, with predictions and statistics on ransomware and vendor risk management.

item.title: Understanding the NIST 800-160 SP 1.1 Draft
item.description: Will NIST 800-160 SP v1.1 help federal security engineers protect against national cyber attack? Time tells all– but here’s what to know now.

item.title: Devil in the Details: How to Address Third-Party Risks
item.description: Address gaps and security issues in your vendor risk management by diving into the details, despite maintaining a good cyber rating at first glance.

item.title: DORA is top of mind, and we aren’t talking about the Explorer
item.description: DORA is reshaping financial institution risk management. Learn what the regulation means, why it matters now, and how third party risk exposure impacts compliance.

item.title: What is HECVAT and how is Black Kite leveraging automation to transform the VRM process?
item.description: HECVAT is key for higher edu VRM. Experience a fully automated, immediate assessment of HECVAT compliance for a vendor using the Black Kite platform.

item.title: Who Owns Cybersecurity in Supply Chain Risk Management?
item.description: Hear Wheatman's perspective on panelist answers on an IT GRC Forum webinar on supply chain risk management - who owns the risk?

item.title: Focus Friday: Third-Party Risks in Qlik Sense, Adobe ColdFusion, and Atlassian Confluence Vulnerabilities
item.description: Focus Friday: Learn more about recent cyber breaches and critical vulnerabilities from Black Kite.

item.title: Focus Friday: Addressing the Critical CVE-2023-7102 Vulnerability in Barracuda ESG
item.description: Focus Friday: Learn more about recent cyber breaches and critical vulnerabilities from Black Kite.

item.title: Transmit Security CIO David Mahdi Talks Cybersecurity Standards
item.description: Risk and Reels podcast, we’re discussing the importance of industry standards in cybersecurity and how to use them to address third-party risk.

item.title: Focus Friday: TPRM Insights on Okta, OwnCloud, OpenVPN, and Citrix Incidents with Black Kite’s Focus Tags™
item.description: Focus Friday: Learn more about recent cyber breaches and critical vulnerabilities from Black Kite.

item.title: What Makes Black Kite the Cyber Risk Intelligence Solution of Choice
item.description: Learn about how Black Kite rises to the top as the cyber risk intelligence solution of choice.

item.title: Top 10 Ways Threat Actors Are Targeting Companies in 2023
item.description: To stay ahead of threat actors, it’s important to track current threat trends and the ways attackers target companies.

item.title: Spotlight on the Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act (GLBA)
item.description: Spotlight on the Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act (GLBA) - Third Party Risk Management Articles and Education from Shared Assessments

item.title: 5 Ways Automation is Revolutionizing Third Party Risk Management
item.description: Automated third-party risk management allows for speed, efficiency and accuracy of vendor risk beyond any human capability.

item.title: New Federal Cybersecurity Legislation Aimed at Protecting Critical Infrastructure
item.description: New requirements for reporting data breaches and ransomware attacks aim to protect critical infrastructure and national public safety.

item.title: Third-Party Risk Management & Cyber News
item.description: Stay up-to-date in the industry by reading our weekly bites of cyber news by Jeffrey Wheatman & Bob Maley.

item.title: Are Cuts Inevitable, or is Cybersecurity Recession Proof?
item.description: Recessions tend to play out the same way. Leaders think they're in the clear until.. they're not. How should cybersecurity teams approach the change in the economy?

item.title: Do You Sbom [Software Bill of Materials], Brah?
item.description: SBOMs have gotten increased focus due to a high-profile software vulnerabilities - why is this the new most important thing to focus on?

item.title: Risk and Reels Goes Live – Hear From Jeffrey Wheatman on Starting a Podcast
item.description: Introducing Risk and Reels: A Cybersecurity Podcast. Learn the inspiration behind the podcast from the host himself, Jeffrey Wheatman.

item.title: Strong Cybersecurity Talent: The Biggest Need for Companies in 2022
item.description: As the hiring market for cybersecurity talent grows and adapts to worldwide changes, companies can adjust tactics to discover candidates in new places.

item.title: Defend Cybersecurity Investment Amidst an Economic Downturn
item.description: In economic downturns, defending investment is imperative for remaining cyber secure and prioritizing risk level maintenance. Discover how.

item.title: 2022 Key Third-Party Breaches: Healthcare Still At Major Risk
item.description: Let’s take a moment to look back, reflect, and learn from some of the key third-party breaches of 2022 where healthcare continued to be a top target.

item.title: Controls without enforcement: Is Zero Trust possible?
item.description: Without alignment on standards, Zero Trust architecture has the potential to discourage gradual growth into compliance due to the daunting ask.

item.title: The CIA Triad: A Key Part of Your Cyber Security Program
item.description: Confidentiality, Integrity, and Availability are the key principles of the CIA triad, the basis for maintaining robust information security procedures.

item.title: CMMC 2.0: Compliance Made Simpler for DoD Contractors
item.description: Do you want to know about Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification? We answered your questions about CMMC.

item.title: Prioritizing Third Party Risk Intelligence in a Managed Services Package
item.description: Modern cybersecurity programs are complex and MSSPs must include a third-party risk intelligence solution in their service offering.

item.title: The Human Firewall: Why Employees Play a Critical Role in Cyber Risk Management
item.description: 90% of cyber breaches are caused by human error. Read more about why your human firewall is just as important as your digital firewall.
